ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: Good quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly legible across 2 pages.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The reference 'HN-SOIC35L230421' contains 'L' as part of a reference number, not as a separate LC field or bank term. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present. LC exception not activated.

locations_found.location: Header / issuer block: 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80, Gothenburg 40522 Sweden'
Header block: 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80, Gothenburg 40522 Sweden'
Bank details: 'Account Holder: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB'

pairing_validation.motivation: Consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' is the invoice issuer (criterion 2 met). Consignee 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' is in the invoice's INVOICE TO and CONSIGNEE fields (criterion 3 met). Pairing validation passed.

consignor.certificate_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, C/O Greencarrier AB, Box 1076, 40522, Göteborg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80, Gothenburg 40522 Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' is found as the invoice issuer in the invoice header on page 1 and page 2, and in the bank details on page 2 ('Account Holder: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB'). Exact name match after normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country matches between certificate and invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice issuer address states 'Sweden'. Additionally confirmed by IBAN prefix 'SE' (SE24...) and phone prefix '+46'. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Corporate structure - consignor name found in invoice header as issuer
Address differences (Box 1076/Göteborg vs Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80/Gothenburg) do not cause MISMATCH per 4.1.5 - company name and country verified

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' at 'C/O Greencarrier AB, Box 1076, 40522, Göteborg, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' at 'Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80, Gothenburg 40522 Sweden'. Company names are identical after normalization. Country is Sweden in both. The address differs (Box 1076/Göteborg in certificate vs Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80/Gothenburg in invoice) but per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not cause MISMATCH — company name and country are the determining factors. Both match. Result: MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Consignor name 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' is identical in certificate and invoice. Country Sweden is confirmed in both documents. Address differences are permitted per rule 4.1.5.

consignee.certificate_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V., Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Z, Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya, San Pedro Sula 21101, Honduras
consignee.invoice_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V., Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Zona Libre, Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya, San Pedro Sula 21101, Honduras

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has both 'INVOICE TO' (primary billing field) and 'CONSIGNEE' fields. Both contain 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.'. Per 4.2.0.2, the INVOICE TO field has priority.
Certificate: 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' — Invoice INVOICE TO: 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' — identical match after normalization.
Certificate address has 'Contiguo a Z' (likely truncated from 'Contiguo a Zona Libre' in invoice). Per 4.2.4, address differences do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - INVOICE TO field used as primary
Address differences (truncated 'Contiguo a Z' vs 'Contiguo a Zona Libre') permitted - company name and country verified

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' in Honduras. Invoice INVOICE TO: 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' in Honduras. Company names are identical. Country Honduras matches. The certificate address shows 'Contiguo a Z' which appears to be a layout truncation of 'Contiguo a Zona Libre', but per 4.2.4, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH. Result: MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee name 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' is identical in both certificate (box 2) and invoice (INVOICE TO field). Country Honduras matches. Address truncation is permitted.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: Certificate reference '22080 / HN-SOIC35L230421' appears to be order/reference numbers, not product article numbers. No explicit article numbers in the certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 - Priority 2: Text matching - identity-bearing main designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Certificate identity-bearing main designation: 'TESTLINER'. Invoice description on all lines: 'Testliner 2'. The word 'TESTLINER' can be identified in the invoice. The '2' in 'Testliner 2' is an additional specification (grade/quality) per 4.3.4 — it does not change the identity-bearing main designation 'TESTLINER'. Additionally 'HS CODE 4805 25' in certificate matches 'HTS: 4805 25' in invoice notes. 'ROLLS' in certificate matches '30 ROLLS' in invoice total line.

Invoice adds '2' (grade number), 'BW 125gsm' (basis weight specification), and 'RW' dimensions. These are specifications that do not change the product identity 'TESTLINER'. The HS code matches. Certificate reference 'HN-SOIC35L230421' differs from invoice ORDER NO. 'HN-SOIC26L230421' — these are references, not product identifiers, and the difference does not affect goods description verification.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'TESTLINER' identified in invoice as 'Testliner 2'
Additional specifications (grade '2', BW, RW) are non-identity-bearing additions

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'TESTLINER HS CODE 4805 25 ROLLS'. Invoice goods: 'Testliner 2' across all 7 line items with HS '4805 25' in notes. The identity-bearing main designation is 'TESTLINER' — this word is identifiable in every invoice line item as 'Testliner'. The '2' after 'Testliner' in the invoice is a grade specification (non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4). The HS code 4805 25 matches exactly. 'ROLLS' matches invoice format. The order reference discrepancy (HN-SOIC35L230421 vs HN-SOIC26L230421) is noted but these are order references, not part of goods description verification. Result: MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing designation 'TESTLINER' in the certificate can be identified in all invoice line items as 'Testliner 2'. HS code 4805 25 matches. 'ROLLS' confirmed. The grade number '2' is a non-identity-bearing specification.

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity in box 7 is the verification basis
comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains two values: '52.992 MT' (weight) and '30' (number of rolls). Per 4.4.2.1, both are in box 7. Weight '52.992 MT' is the primary quantity with explicit unit.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 52.992 MT can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice total line shows '52.992 MT 30 ROLLS'. The value 52.992 MT is explicitly present in the invoice total line. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 30 (rolls) can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice total line shows '30 ROLLS'. The value 30 is explicitly present. Match.

comparison_steps.description: Check if weight category (GW/NW) is specified
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states '52.992 MT' without explicit GW/NW category. Per 4.4.2.2 rule 2: certificate has ONE weight value without category, and this value can be identified in invoice (52.992 MT in total line), and invoice does NOT contain a conflicting alternative weight value of another category. Result: MATCH per 4.4.2.2 rule 2.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - 52.992 MT found exactly in invoice total line
Box 7 contains weight and roll count - both verified
Single weight value without GW/NW category - value confirmed in invoice without conflicting alternative
Multiple quantity values in certificate - at least one verified (both verified in this case)

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '52.992 MT' and '30'. Invoice total line: '52.992 MT 30 ROLLS'. Both numerical values are explicitly present in the invoice. Weight 52.992 MT matches exactly. Roll count 30 matches exactly. No weight category (GW/NW) is specified in the certificate but per 4.4.2.2 rule 2, when a single weight value without category can be identified in the invoice and there is no conflicting alternative weight, this is MATCH. Result: MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Both quantity values from the certificate (52.992 MT and 30 rolls) are explicitly present in the invoice total line. Exact numerical match.

comparison_steps.details: Invoice NOTES section contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. This is an explicit origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU GERMANY'. Verify EU component.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states 'EU GERMANY'. This is 'EU' combined with ONE specific EU member state 'GERMANY'. Per 4.5.4.2.1: when certificate states EU combined with ONE specific EU member state, and invoice contains an explicit EU-origin statement or confirms the member state, this is MATCH. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Germany is an EU member state. Per 4.5.4.2: if certificate states a specific EU member state and invoice confirms it, verified. Additionally, per 4.5.4.2.1: certificate states 'EU GERMANY' (EU + one member state), invoice states 'GERMANY'. Germany is EU member → the EU component is verified since Germany is EU.
Germany (DE) is an EU-27 member state. Certificate issue date 2023-06-20 — Germany was EU member at that date.

comparison_steps.description: Check that each origin country in certificate can be identified in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Certificate origin 'EU GERMANY' contains two components: 'EU' and 'GERMANY'. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Germany is EU member, so the 'EU' component is verified via 4.5.4.2 (specific EU member state ↔ EU is interchangeable). 'GERMANY' is explicitly stated. No non-EU origins in the invoice. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice NOTES section as 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'
EU normalization - certificate states 'EU GERMANY', invoice states 'GERMANY' which is EU member
EU member state check - Germany is EU-27 member, interchangeable with EU designation
Certificate states EU + one specific member state (GERMANY). Invoice confirms GERMANY as origin. EU origin verified since Germany is EU member.
Positive verification - all origin countries in certificate identified in invoice

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'EU GERMANY'. Invoice NOTES: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. The certificate states two origin components: 'EU' (European Union) and 'GERMANY'. The invoice explicitly states 'GERMANY' as country of origin. Germany is an EU-27 member state (confirmed at certificate issue date 2023-06-20). Per 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states 'EU [one specific EU member state]' and invoice confirms that member state, the EU component is verified because Germany being EU means the EU designation is inherently satisfied. No non-EU origin countries appear in the invoice. All origin countries in the certificate are verified in the invoice. Result: MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate origin 'EU GERMANY' is verified. Invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Germany is an EU member state, verifying both the 'EU' and 'GERMANY' components.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No LC reference found in certificate. Reference 'HN-SOIC35L230421' contains 'L' as part of order reference, not a Letter of Credit designation.
Document A is certificate (EU Certificate of Origin). Document B is invoice (Commercial Invoice NO. 10102). Clear separation of document types.

Consignor 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' is invoice issuer (criterion 2). Consignee 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' is in INVOICE TO and CONSIGNEE fields (criterion 3). At least one criterion met.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Corporate structure - consignor search in all files
rule_evaluation_log.details: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB found as invoice issuer on pages 1 and 2, and in bank account holder on page 2.
Sweden in certificate matches Sweden in invoice. Also confirmed by IBAN SE-prefix.
Company name identical, country matches. Address differences (Box vs street) are permitted.
Invoice has INVOICE TO field (primary). Used for verification.
Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. identical in both documents.
Company name and country match. Address truncation ('Contiguo a Z' vs 'Contiguo a Zona Libre') is permitted.
TESTLINER identified in all invoice lines as 'Testliner 2'. HS code 4805 25 matches.
Grade '2', BW/RW specs are additional non-identity-bearing specifications.
52.992 MT and 30 rolls found in invoice total line.
Single weight value without GW/NW, confirmed in invoice, no conflicting alternative. Rule 2 applied.
EU component verified via Germany being EU member state.
Germany is EU-27 member. Certificate 'EU GERMANY' ↔ Invoice 'GERMANY' verified.

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU + one specific member state exception
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate states EU + GERMANY (one member state). Invoice confirms GERMANY. EU origin verified.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Positive verification of all origin countries
rule_evaluation_log.details: All origin countries in certificate (EU, GERMANY) verified in invoice. No non-EU origins in invoice.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Order reference mismatch indicates wrong document pair
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Certificate reference 'HN-SOIC35L230421' differs from invoice ORDER NO. 'HN-SOIC26L230421'. However, the certificate does not explicitly reference a specific invoice number — the reference in box 6 appears to be an order/shipping reference, not a formal invoice number. Pairing validation passed on consignor and consignee criteria (8.6). The order reference difference does not invalidate the document pair since all other key identifiers (consignor, consignee, goods, quantity, origin) match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: LC exception should be activated due to 'L' in reference HN-SOIC35L230421
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per 2.2 critical rule on bank term context: the 'L' in 'HN-SOIC35L230421' is embedded within a reference number string, not preceded by or coupled to an explicit bank term designation. No separate field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or similar exists. LC exception not activated.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description MISMATCH because certificate says 'TESTLINER' but invoice says 'Testliner 2'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4: the identity-bearing main designation is 'TESTLINER'. This is identifiable in the invoice as 'Testliner' (case normalization applied). The '2' is a grade/quality specification — a non-identity-bearing addition per 4.3.4. It does not change the product identity.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin MISMATCH because certificate says 'EU GERMANY' but invoice says only 'GERMANY'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per 4.5.4.2 and 4.5.4.2.1: Germany is an EU-27 member state. The certificate stating 'EU GERMANY' and the invoice stating 'GERMANY' is a valid match because EU ↔ specific member state is interchangeable. The EU component is inherently verified when the named member state is confirmed.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändare SOIC Trade and Logistics AB och mottagare Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V. är identiska i båda dokumenten. Varubeskrivningen Testliner med HS-kod 4805 25 bekräftas i fakturan. Kvantiteten 52,992 MT och 30 rullar stämmer exakt. Ursprungsland EU/Tyskland bekräftas av fakturans angivelse 'Country of Origin: Germany'.
warnings: Order reference differs between certificate (HN-SOIC35L230421) and invoice (HN-SOIC26L230421). This does not affect verification as it is not a formal invoice number reference, and all substantive fields match.

evidence_list.raw_text: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.
Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.summary: Samtliga kontrollpunkter ger MATCH. Certifikatet kan verifieras mot fakturan. Rekommendation: automatiskt godkännande.

sections.certificate_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, C/O Greencarrier AB, Box 1076, 40522, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: SOIC Trade and Logistics AB, Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80, Gothenburg 40522 Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning via företagsnamn i fakturans sidhuvud
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'SOIC Trade and Logistics AB' är identiskt i certifikatet och i fakturans sidhuvud/utställarblock. Land Sverige bekräftat i båda dokumenten. Adressskillnad (Box 1076/Göteborg vs Torgny Segerstedtsgatan 80/Gothenburg) påverkar inte bedömningen då företagsnamn och land är avgörande.

sections.certificate_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V., Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Z, Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya, San Pedro Sula 21101, Honduras
sections.invoice_value: Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V., Prolongación 27 Calle, Contiguo a Zona Libre, Astro Honduras, Co. Felipe Zelaya, San Pedro Sula 21101, Honduras
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning via INVOICE TO-fält (primärt faktureringsfält)
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Astro Carton Honduras S.A. de C.V.' är identiskt i certifikatet och i fakturans INVOICE TO-fält. Land Honduras bekräftat. Adresstrunkering ('Contiguo a Z' vs 'Contiguo a Zona Libre') bedöms som layoutbegränsning i certifikatet.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'TESTLINER' identifierad i fakturan
sections.motivation: Huvudbeteckningen 'TESTLINER' återfinns i samtliga fakturaraderbeskrivningar som 'Testliner 2'. Siffran '2' är en sortsspecifikation som inte ändrar produktidentiteten. HS-kod 4805 25 överensstämmer exakt. 'ROLLS' bekräftas i fakturan.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt förekomstkontroll – båda numeriska värden uttryckligen identifierade i fakturans totalrad
sections.motivation: Vikten 52.992 MT från certifikatets ruta 7 återfinns exakt i fakturans totalrad. Antalet 30 rullar återfinns exakt som '30 ROLLS' i fakturans totalrad. Exakt numerisk överensstämmelse utan behov av normalisering eller beräkning.

sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering – Tyskland är EU-medlemsstat; 'EU GERMANY' verifierat mot 'GERMANY'
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'EU GERMANY'. Fakturan anger uttryckligen 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: GERMANY'. Tyskland är EU-medlemsstat, vilket verifierar EU-komponenten. Båda delarna av certifikatets ursprungsangivelse är bekräftade.
